name: Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie on a flat bench, grab bar with a medium-width grip, lower to chest, then push up.

name: Dumbbell Flyes
instructions: Lie on a flat bench, lower dumbbells in an arc to the sides, then bring back together.

name: Push-ups
instructions: Place hands slightly wider than shoulders, lower body until chest nearly touches floor, push up.

name: Incline DB Press
instructions: Lie on an incline bench, press dumbbells up from shoulder level.

name: Cable Crossover
instructions: Pull cables together in front of chest in a downward or forward arc.

name: Pull-ups
instructions: Hang from a bar, pull body up until chin is over the bar.

name: Deadlift
instructions: Lift a weighted barbell off the ground to hip level, then lower it back down.

name: Barbell Row
instructions: Bend at hips with straight back, pull bar to lower chest.

name: Lat Pulldown
instructions: Pull a wide bar down to upper chest while seated.

name: Seated Cable Row
instructions: Pull cable handle toward abdomen while seated.

name: Overhead Press
instructions: Press a barbell from upper chest to arm's length overhead.

name: Lateral Raises
instructions: Raise dumbbells out to the sides until arms are parallel to the floor.

name: Front Raises
instructions: Raise dumbbells forward to shoulder height.

name: Reverse Flyes
instructions: Bend forward, raise dumbbells to the sides focusing on rear delts.

name: Face Pulls
instructions: Pull cable rope toward forehead, flaring elbows out.

name: Barbell Curl
instructions: Curl a barbell from hips toward shoulders.

name: Hammer Curls
instructions: Curl dumbbells with a neutral grip (palms facing each other).

name: Preacher Curls
instructions: Curl bar while arms are supported on a preacher bench incline.

name: Concentration Curls
instructions: Curl dumbbell while seated, elbow pressed against inner thigh.

name: Triceps Pushdown
instructions: Push a cable bar or rope down until arms are straight.

name: Skull Crushers
instructions: Lie on bench, lower bar toward forehead by bending elbows, then extend.

name: Dips
instructions: Lower and raise body using parallel bars, focusing on triceps.

name: Overhead Extension
instructions: Hold dumbbell overhead and lower behind head by bending elbows.

name: Squat
instructions: Lower hips until thighs are parallel to floor, then return to standing.

name: Leg Press
instructions: Push the weighted platform away using your legs, then lower controlled.

name: Lunges
instructions: Step forward and lower hips until both knees are bent at about 90 degrees.

name: Leg Extensions
instructions: Extend legs from a 90-degree angle to straight while seated on machine.

name: Leg Curls
instructions: Curl legs toward glutes while lying or seated on machine.

name: Calf Raises
instructions: Rise up onto the balls of your feet, then lower down.

name: Plank
instructions: Hold a push-up position but with weight on forearms instead of hands.

name: Crunches
instructions: Lie on back, knees bent, lift shoulders off floor using abdominal muscles.

name: Leg Raises
instructions: Lie on back, lift straight legs toward vertical, then lower slowly.

name: Russian Twists
instructions: Seated with feet off floor, rotate torso from side to side.
